title: New Strait of Hormuz Closure Announcement Threatens the Slow Uptick in Traffic
summary_full: Fifty-five ships had passed through the strait on Saturday, the U.S. military said. But then Iran’s military said it was closing the waterway once again.
summary_public: Fifty-five ships had passed through the strait on Saturday, the U.S. military said. But then Iran’s military said it was closing the waterway once again.
